texto: If a ship has been sunk I can't bring it up. If it is going to be sunk I can't stop it. I can use my time much better working on tomorrow's problem than by fretting about yesterday's. Besides if I let those things get me I wouldn't last long.
explicacao: Citação de Admiral Ernest J. King sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “If a ship has been sunk I can't bring it up. If it is going to be sunk I can't stop it. I can use…” articula tempo, acceptance, reflexao em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
